title: Mantle.gg
description: Earn gems & cosmetic chests by completing fun Minecraft challenges, all completely free.
body:
# Mantle.gg - Free Minecraft Cosmetics

**Mantle.gg** is the ultimate Minecraft mod for personalizing your experience. This free cosmetic mod allows players to express themselves with wide range of cosmetics, such as Capes, Hats, Backpacks, Shoes and much more.

## Features:
- **Earn Gems and Chests:** Complete daily challenges, weekly focuses, or just play your favorite servers like Hypixel to earn gems that you can use to get cosmetics.
- **Free Cosmetics:** Say goodbye to expensive cosmetic items; all of the cosmetics are free.
- **Variety of Cosmetics:** Choose from hats, masks, shoulder pads, torso items, shoes, wings, backpacks, and more.
- **Rare Cosmetics:** Cosmetics come in various rarities from common to legendary. The rarer the cosmetic, the more stylish your character.
- **Chests for Extra Rewards:** Unlock rare and normal chests for a chance to get rare cosmetics and more gems.
- **Customize Your Look:** Use the wardrobe feature to craft your unique Minecraft character.
- **Challenges and Rewards:** Complete fun and exciting challenges to earn gems and unlock new cosmetics.
- **Easy Installation and Updates:** Download the free desktop app to install and update the mod easily.
- **Wide Compatibility:** Supports Forge and Fabric mod loaders, all popular Minecraft versions, and major launchers.

Transform your Minecraft experience with **Mantle.gg** – where your adventure and style meet.

## Installation:
1. Download the Mantle.gg desktop app.
2. Install the mod with a simple click.
3. Start customizing your Minecraft character right away!

## Notice
The Mantle mod sends a few statistics to our servers to track your challenges and give you gems accordingly. These stats include things such as what blocks you place and break, items you pick up, throw and put in/take from containers.

Start your personalized Minecraft adventure today with Mantle.gg!
